title: Ultimate Villager Armor
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/u-oMAtgWKKk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## This mod finally adds rendering to the armour your villagers are wearing!

### Even better:
● Sneak and right-click to equip / retrieve their armour like you would with an armour stand.  
● Zombified villagers retain their armour and won't let you take it!

****

# ⚙️ Configuration

### ✦ Toggle rendering for each piece of armour / elytra individually!  
### ✦ X | Y | Z offset available  
### ✦ Size tweakable for your own models  

****

### ✨ Compatible with other mods and resource packs too
So if you don't know what to do with all your diamonds, start making gear for your villagers now 😉
